<!--
TITLE FORMAT:
BUG-<MODULE>-<AREA>-<ID> – Short description

EXAMPLES:
BUG-AUTH-API-001 – Login returns 500 error
BUG-INVOICE-UI-002 – Total amount not updated after item removal
-->

## 📌 Summary
Provide a concise description of the defect.

---

## 🧭 Environment
- Environment: (e.g. Local / Staging / Production / VPS)
- Application Version:
- Browser:
- OS:
- Device:

---

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce
1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. Step 3

---

## ❌ Actual Result
Describe what actually happens.

---

## ✅ Expected Result
Describe what should happen according to requirements.

---

## 📊 Severity
- [ ] 🔴 Critical (system unusable / blocker)
- [ ] 🟠 Major (core functionality affected)
- [ ] 🟡 Minor (partial issue / workaround exists)
- [ ] ⚪ Trivial (cosmetic issue)

---

## 🔥 Priority (optional)
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

---

## 📎 Attachments / Evidence
- Screenshots
- Logs
- Videos

---

## 🔗 Related Test Case
TC-XXX-001

---

## 🔗 Related User Story
STORY-XXX-001

---

## 🔍 Root Cause Analysis (if known)
Describe suspected cause (optional).

---

## 🧪 Notes
Any additional observations or edge cases.
